ew_context: ETH finding support at 61.8% Fibonacci retracement level suggests wave 2 or B wave correction nearing completion before next impulse higher
pattern_desc: Precise bounce from 2298.06 Fibonacci 61.8% retracement level with prior swing highs at 2464.68 providing clear upside targets.
invalidation: Close below 2298.06 on D1 timeframe breaks Fibonacci support and targets deeper retracement levels
market_context: Crypto showing resilience despite Treasury yields at 12-month highs. CLARITY Act progress and institutional adoption supporting selective strength.
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Ethereum has found precise support at the 2298.06 level, which represents the 61.8% Fibonacci retracement from recent swing highs. The bounce from this key technical level occurs with RSI at 44.7%, indicating oversold relief potential without extreme readings. EMA20 at 2300.73 trades marginally above EMA50 at 2273.78, maintaining bullish trend structure despite recent correction from 2464.68 highs.

ATR of 68.60 reflects elevated cryptocurrency volatility, while Reynolds number of 244.67 indicates turbulent impulsive flow patterns typical of crypto breakout moves, though momentum alignment shows some divergence requiring monitoring.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 2345.79 (Fibonacci 38.2% retracement level), 2423.06 (prior structural resistance)
- **Support**: 2298.06 (Fibonacci 61.8% retracement and current entry level)

## Invalidation Level

Close below 2298.06 on D1 timeframe would break the key Fibonacci support and likely target the 2220.79 swing low area or deeper retracement levels.

## Macro & Flow Context

Crypto sector showing selective strength with CLARITY Act clearing Senate banking panel and institutional adoption trends. Despite Treasury yields hitting 12-month highs, Ethereum's technical bounce at key Fibonacci support suggests underlying demand resilience.
